title: Permutations and Video Duration at 25 fps (n = 1..9)
content_html:
Permutations and 25 fps Video Duration

Timestamp: Sunday, 31 August 2025 at 05:30 PM Prompt: Create an html table showing the number of permutations for n = 1 to 9. Add a column to show how long a 25fps video would last, in minutes, using these permutations as individual frames.

Formula: permutations = n!; minutes = n! / (25 × 60) = n! / 1500.

n n! (number of permutations) Duration at 25 fps (minutes)
1 1 0.000667
2 2 0.001333
3 6 0.004000
4 24 0.016000
5 120 0.080000
6 720 0.480000
7 5,040 3.360000
8 40,320 26.880000
9 362,880 241.920000
